# Prompt Element Cards

Use these cards to build a safe prompt.

## Do Not Edit Yet

```text
Do not modify files yet.
```

## Analyze First

```text
Analyze the checkout validation logic and identify opportunities to simplify it without changing production behavior.
```

## Inspect Relevant Files

```text
Inspect CLAUDE.md, CheckoutService.java, CouponPolicy.java, EnterpriseCustomerPolicy.java, PaymentResultMapper.java, CheckoutServiceTest.java, API contract, and incident notes.
```

## Preserve Behavior

```text
Preserve coupon expiration behavior, enterprise eligibility, payment error codes, reason-code logging, and failure-path tests.
```

## Identify Tests

```text
Return existing tests and additional characterization tests needed before code changes.
```

## Identify Risks

```text
Call out risk areas where simplification could change behavior.
```

## Identify Approval Owners

```text
List checkout, payment, API, QA, and architecture owners if approval is needed.
```

## Define Rollback

```text
Describe rollback considerations for a production checkout change.
```

## Wait for Approval

```text
Wait for human approval before editing files.
```
